name: litert-lm
description: Google's production-ready C++ inference framework for LLMs on edge devices. Powers Chrome, Chromebook Plus, Pixel Watch.

litert.name: litert
litert.description: LiteRT core runtime (successor to TFLite). Provides Interpreter, delegates (XNNPACK, GPU, NNAPI), FlatBuffer model format.

abseil-cpp.note: Transitive via LiteRT-LM. Provides absl::StatusOr, absl::AnyInvocable, absl::Duration, etc.

flatbuffers.note: Transitive via LiteRT. TFLite model serialization format.

protobuf.note: Transitive via LiteRT-LM. Model metadata and engine config protos.

xnnpack.note: Transitive via LiteRT. High-performance CPU inference library.
